title: Senior Software Engineer, AI Centre of Excellence
company_focus: Global digital payments processing and fintech platform
description:
Company Description

We’re Checkout.com – you might not know our name, but
companies like eBay, ASOS, Klarna, Uber Eats, and Sony do.
That moment when you check out online? We make it happen.

Checkout.com is where the world checks out. Our global
network powers billions of transactions every year, making
money move without making a fuss. We spent years perfecting
a service most people will never notice. Because when
digital payments just work, businesses grow, customers stay,
and no one stops to think about why.

With 19 offices spanning six continents, we feel at home
everywhere – but London is our HQ. Wherever our people work
their magic, they’re fast-moving, performance-obsessed, and
driven by being better every day. Ideal. Because a role here
isn’t just another job; it’s a career-defining opportunity
to build the future of fintech.

Job Description

Job Description

As a Senior AI Engineer within Checkout.com’s AI Centre of
Excellence, you will drive the adoption of cutting-edge
Generative AI technologies to transform how we operate and
innovate. You will mentor peers, set engineering best
practices, and shape Checkout.com’s AI strategy, while also
designing, building, and deploying AI solutions that enhance
products and streamline business processes in collaboration
with cross-functional teams.

How you’ll make an impact:

- Partner with product managers, data scientists, and
  engineers to research, validate, and deliver high-impact
  Generative AI use cases.
- Design and build APIs and microservices that integrate AI
  capabilities into internal and external workflows.
- Develop, fine-tune, and deploy LLM-based applications (e.g.,
  chatbots, assistants, knowledge extraction tools).
- Architect scalable AI infrastructure on cloud platforms
  (AWS, GCP, or Azure), leveraging containerisation and IaC.
- Implement CI/CD pipelines and enforce best practices for
  secure, compliant AI deployment.
- Build intuitive interfaces that enable teams to interact
  effectively with AI-driven features.
- Continuously optimise performance, reliability, and
  scalability of AI systems.

What we're looking for:

- Hands-on experience with LLMs (e.g., GPT, BERT, Llama,
  Gemini) and applying them to real-world problems.
- Strong backend engineering expertise, including RESTful APIs
  and micro-services design.
- Proficiency in Python/JavaScript and familiarity with AI
  frameworks (e.g., LangChain, PydanticAI).
- Solid understanding of cloud computing (AWS, GCP, or Azure),
  containerisation (Docker, Kubernetes), and Infrastructure-
  as-Code (Terraform).
- Proven problem-solving skills and ability to thrive in fast-
  paced environments.
- Excellent communication and collaboration skills across
  diverse teams.

Preferred qualifications:

- Proficiency in C# or Java.
- Frontend development experience with JavaScript/TypeScript
  and frameworks such as React.
- Experience developing Generative AI applications, including
  model fine-tuning and prototyping.
- Awareness of ethical AI practices and emerging standards in
  AI governance.
- Track record of rapid prototyping with measurable ROI.
- Familiarity with distributed systems and large-scale data
  processing.
- Contributions to open-source projects or a strong GitHub
  portfolio.
- High technical curiosity and eagerness to learn new
  platforms.
- Experience in the payments industry (a strong plus).

Bring all of you to work

We create the conditions for high performers to thrive –
through real ownership, fewer blockers, and work that makes
a difference from day one.

Here, you’ll move fast, take on meaningful challenges, and
be recognized for the impact you deliver. It’s a place where
ambition gets met with opportunity – and where your growth
is in your hands.

We work as one team, and we back each other to succeed. So
whatever your background or identity, if you’re ready to
grow and make a difference, you’ll be right at home here.

It’s important we set you up for success and make our
process as accessible as possible. So let us know in your
application, or tell your recruiter directly, if you need
anything to make your experience or working environment more
comfortable.


Life at Checkout.com

We understand that work is just one part of your life. Our
hybrid working model offers flexibility, with three days per
week in the office to support collaboration and connection.

Curious about what it’s like to be part of our team? Visit
our Careers Page to learn more about our culture, open
roles, and what drives us.

For a closer look at daily life at Checkout.com, follow us
on LinkedIn and Instagram
responsibilities: Partner with product managers, data scientists, and engineers to research, validate, and deliver high-impact Generative AI use cases
Design and build APIs and microservices that integrate AI capabilities into internal and external workflows
Develop, fine-tune, and deploy LLM-based applications including chatbots, assistants, and knowledge extraction tools
Architect scalable AI infrastructure on cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) leveraging containerisation and IaC
Implement CI/CD pipelines and enforce best practices for secure, compliant AI deployment
Build intuitive interfaces that enable teams to interact effectively with AI-driven features
Continuously optimise performance, reliability, and scalability of AI systems
Mentor peers and set engineering best practices within the AI Centre of Excellence
use_cases: AI-powered chatbots and virtual assistants for internal or customer use
Knowledge extraction tools for business process automation
Generative AI integration into payment processing workflows and products
Streamlining internal business processes through AI-driven automation
Enhancing product capabilities with AI-driven features
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building, fine-tuning, and
deploying LLM-based applications (chatbots, assistants,
knowledge extraction tools), designing AI infrastructure,
and implementing GenAI solutions. The engineer works hands-
on with LLMs and AI frameworks like LangChain, making this
an ai-first role.
